pageDescription: Calculate the number of gallons needed per square foot for painting or flooring

placeholders.totalArea: Enter total area in square feet

definition.title: Coverage Rate
definition.description: The area that can be covered by one gallon of paint or coating material

factors.title: Affecting Factors
factors.description: Surface texture, porosity, application method, and material quality affect coverage rates

applications.title: Real-world Applications
applications.description: Used in construction, painting, and flooring projects to estimate material requirements

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides coverage estimates only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Actual coverage may vary based on surface conditions and application technique

importantNotesList: Standard paint coverage is approximately 400 square feet per gallon
Rough or porous surfaces may require more material
Multiple coats may be needed for optimal coverage
Always purchase extra material to account for waste and touch-ups

messages.enterInformation: Enter the gallons available and area to calculate coverage requirements
messages.resultMessage: Your coverage calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides coverage estimates based on standard industry values. Actual coverage may vary based on surface conditions, application technique, material quality, and other factors not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Construction Resources
seekHelp.content: For professional painting and flooring estimates, consult with contractors or material suppliers who can assess specific project requirements and conditions.

errors.totalGallons: Please enter a valid number of gallons
errors.totalArea: Please enter a valid area in square feet
errors.coverageRate: Please enter a valid coverage rate

tooltips.totalGallons: Total gallons of paint or coating material available
tooltips.totalArea: Total area to be covered in square feet
tooltips.coverageRate: Coverage rate in square feet per gallon (typically 400 for standard paint)

enter_length_width_and_height_in_feet_to: Enter length, width, and height in feet to calculate gallons per square foot
a_l_w_area_in_square_feet_47: A = L × W (Area in square feet)
a_h_l_w_h_volume_in_cubic_feet_50: = A × H = (L × W) × H (Volume in cubic feet)
calculate_volume_and_chemical_dosing_rat: Calculate volume and chemical dosing rates
determine_liquid_storage_capacity_per_fl: Determine liquid storage capacity per floor area
estimate_concrete_paint_or_coating_cover: Estimate concrete, paint, or coating coverage
design_fish_tanks_and_water_systems_69: Design fish tanks and water systems
this_conversion_factor_is_exact_and_wide:
This conversion factor is exact and widely used in construction, plumbing, and engineering
                        applications.
length_10_ft_width_8_ft_height_3_ft_75: Length = 10 ft, Width = 8 ft, Height = 3 ft
